# PUT /api/v1/notifications/templates/{id}

**Update notification template**

تحديث قالب إشعار - API-NOTIF-008

Operation ID: `update`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATE_UPDATE (found on service:NotificationTemplateService)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer | Yes |  |

Schema: `NotificationTemplateUpdateRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| templateNameAr | string | Yes | maxLength: 200 | Template display name (Arabic) |  |
| templateNameEn | string | Yes | maxLength: 200 | Template display name (English) |  |
| channelTypeId | string | Yes | maxLength: 20 | Target channel (LOV-NOTIF-001) | EMAIL |
| moduleCode | string | Yes | maxLength: 20 | Owning module code | SECURITY |
| templateBodyAr | string | No |  | Template body, Arabic |  |
| templateBodyEn | string | No |  | Template body, English |  |
